# SpenGo

> Personal expense tracker powered by Google Sheets. No servers, no ads, no data collection.

## What is SpenGo?

SpenGo is a lightweight, mobile-first web application for tracking personal expenses. All data is stored directly in the user's own Google Spreadsheet — there are no backend servers, no databases, and no third-party data storage.

## Core Features

### Expense Tracking
- Add expenses in seconds with a minimal input flow
- Edit or delete any entry anytime
- Filter expenses by category
- Categories: Food, Transport, Housing, Health, Entertainment, Sport, Clothes, Education, Eating out, Travel, Subscriptions, Other

### Statistics & Insights
- Bar chart by period (day / week / month / year)
- Donut chart showing category breakdown
- Time frames: Week, Month, Year with navigation between periods
- Instant updates without page reload

### Data & Privacy
- Expenses saved directly to user's Google Drive via Google Sheets API
- No backend servers or databases
- No ads, no tracking, no analytics collection
- Uses only minimal OAuth scopes: `spreadsheets` and `drive.file`

### Collaboration
- Share your Google Sheet with a partner
- Real-time updates for multiple users
- Ability to revoke access anytime

### Additional Features
- Multilingual support: English, Russian, Spanish, Polish, Czech
- Recent expenses cached locally in browser (localStorage)
- Fast UI with instant feedback

## Tech Stack

- React (UI components, rendered via createRoot)
- Vanilla JavaScript (ES Modules, business logic and state)
- Vite (build tool)
- Chart.js (bar chart and donut chart in Statistics screen)
- Google Identity Services (OAuth 2.0)
- Google Sheets API v4
- Hosted on Vercel

## Pages

- App: https://webspengo.xyz/
- Privacy Policy: https://webspengo.xyz/privacy-policy/
- Features: https://webspengo.xyz/features/
- Articles: https://webspengo.xyz/articles/

## Privacy

SpenGo does not collect, store, or share any personal data. All expense data belongs to the user and lives in their own Google account.
